title: Termination
text: This Agreement may be terminated: (a) by either Party by providing fifteen (15) days' prior written notice after expiry of the lock-in period, if any; (b) by the Licensor/Landlord immediately if the Licensee/Tenant fails to pay the license fee/rent within fifteen (15) days of the due date on two or more consecutive occasions, or uses the Premises for any unlawful purpose, or commits any material breach not remedied within seven (7) days of written notice. Upon termination, the Licensee/Tenant shall vacate the Premises within the notice period, returning them in the same condition as at commencement (reasonable wear and tear excepted), and hand over all keys and access devices. The Licensor/Landlord may seek possession through appropriate legal proceedings if the Licensee/Tenant fails to vacate.
statutory_reference: Transfer of Property Act, 1882 – S.106; Model Tenancy Act, 2021 – S.21
